languages.original_text: "They carried the light of faith through a heavy duty of isolation and abandonment. This service is one of the most difficult and most purifying. You can trust these subjects of the God-Emperor."

languages.text: "Они пронесли свет веры сквозь тяжелый долг одиночества и покинутости. Это служение — одно из самых трудных и очищающих. Ты можешь верить этим подданным Бога-Императора".
"They carried the light of faith through a heavy duty of isolation and abandonment. This service is one of the most difficult and most purifying. You can trust these subjects of the God-Emperor."
languages.original_text: "Они пронесли свет веры сквозь тяжелый долг одиночества и покинутости. Это служение — одно из самых трудных и очищающих. Ты можешь верить этим подданным Бога-Императора".

traits.locale_text: "They carried the light of faith through a heavy duty of isolation and abandonment. This service is one of the most difficult and most purifying. You can trust these subjects of the God-Emperor."
"They carried the light of faith through a heavy duty of isolation and abandonment. This service is one of the most difficult and most purifying. You can trust these subjects of the God-Emperor."
"They carried the light of faith through a heavy duty of isolation and abandonment. This service is one of the most difficult and most purifying. You can trust these subjects of the God-Emperor."

languages.text: 「彼らは信仰の光を、孤立と放棄の重荷を背負いながら運んだ。この奉仕は最も困難で最も清められるものの一つである。神皇帝の臣民は信頼できる」
languages.original_text: "They carried the light of faith through a heavy duty of isolation and abandonment. This service is one of the most difficult and most purifying. You can trust these subjects of the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: 「彼らは信仰の光を、孤立と放棄の重荷を背負いながら運んだ。この奉仕は最も困難で最も清められるものの一つである。神皇帝の臣民は信頼できる。」

languages.text: « Ils ont préservé en eux la lumière de la foi tout en portant le lourd fardeau de l'isolation et de l'abandon, accomplissant ainsi un devoir parmi les plus difficiles et des plus purificateurs. Ces sujets de l'Empereur-Dieu sont dignes de votre confiance. »
languages.original_text: "They carried the light of faith through a heavy duty of isolation and abandonment. This service is one of the most difficult and most purifying. You can trust these subjects of the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: « Ils ont préservé en eux la lumière de la foi tout en portant le lourd fardeau de l'isolation et de l'abandon, accomplissant ainsi un devoir parmi les plus difficiles et des plus purificateurs. Ces sujets de l'Empereur-Dieu sont dignes de votre confiance. »

languages.text: "Sie haben das Licht des Glaubens trotz ihrer Isolation und Verlassenheit weitergetragen. Einer der schwierigsten und reinigendsten Dienste überhaupt. Ihr könnt diesen Dienern des Gottimperators vertrauen."
languages.original_text: "They carried the light of faith through a heavy duty of isolation and abandonment. This service is one of the most difficult and most purifying. You can trust these subjects of the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: "Sie haben das Licht des Glaubens trotz ihrer Isolation und Verlassenheit weitergetragen. Einer der schwierigsten und reinigendsten Dienste überhaupt. Ihr könnt diesen Dienern des Gottimperators vertrauen."

languages.text: "İnancın ışığını ağır bir tecrit ve terk edilmişlik vazifesi boyunca taşıdılar. Bu hizmet, en zor ve en arındırıcı olanlardan biridir. Tanrı İmparator'un bu tebaasına güvenebiliriz."
languages.original_text: "They carried the light of faith through a heavy duty of isolation and abandonment. This service is one of the most difficult and most purifying. You can trust these subjects of the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: "İnancın ışığını ağır bir tecrit ve terk edilmişlik vazifesi boyunca taşıdılar. Bu hizmet, en zor ve en arındırıcı olanlardan biridir. Tanrı İmparator'un bu tebaasına güvenebiliriz."

languages.text: «Han llevado con abnegación la luz de su fe a pesar del aislamiento y el abandono. Este es uno de los servicios más difíciles y redentores. Puede usted confiar en estos súbditos del Dios Emperador».
languages.original_text: "They carried the light of faith through a heavy duty of isolation and abandonment. This service is one of the most difficult and most purifying. You can trust these subjects of the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: «Han llevado con abnegación la luz de su fe a pesar del aislamiento y el abandono. Este es uno de los servicios más difíciles y redentores. Puede usted confiar en estos súbditos del Dios Emperador».

languages.text: “他们被遗弃，被孤立，却依然承载着信仰之光，负重前行。这种服役是最艰难、也最纯粹的。你可以信任这些神皇子民。”
languages.original_text: "They carried the light of faith through a heavy duty of isolation and abandonment. This service is one of the most difficult and most purifying. You can trust these subjects of the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: “他们被遗弃，被孤立，却依然承载着信仰之光，负重前行。这种服役是最艰难、也最纯粹的。你可以信任这些神皇子民。”
